name: John Cornyn
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $2,086,416 for John Cornyn in U.S. Senate, TX. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
